sophiatown.title: Sophiatown '21
sophiatown.desc: A nostalgic look at the vibrant musical, style and cultural hub of Sophiatown during its golden era, celebrating resilience and style.

izimbokodo.title: Izimbokodo '22
izimbokodo.desc: Inspired by the courage and resilience of Black South African women, exploring femininity and traditional South African identity.

khumbulekhaya.title: Khumbulekhaya '22
khumbulekhaya.desc: A celebration of reconnecting with family, culture and heritage. Home is not a place — it is a feeling carried within.

umkhathizwe.title: Umkhathizwe — The Horizon '23
umkhathizwe.desc: Debuted at Lagos Fashion Week. A futuristic exploration of African fashion reaching beyond boundaries into the global horizon.

inganekwane.title: Inganekwane '23
inganekwane.desc: Inspired by traditional folklore and childhood stories, combining playful proportions with rich woven heritage textiles.

kwa-suka-sukela.title: Kwa-suka-sukela '24
kwa-suka-sukela.desc: A tribute to oral storytelling traditions, featuring bold silhouettes, structural details, and contemporary pattern work.

ngithwale.title: Ngithwale — Carry Me '24
ngithwale.desc: This collection honours mothers and the generations of women whose sacrifices, prayers and strength continue to carry us.

zodwa.title: Zodwa '25
zodwa.desc: Ezokhetho's signature collection celebrating modern tailoring, flowing drapes, and timeless structured designs.

entathakusa.title: Entathakusa '26
entathakusa.desc: Celebrating the morning dawn, new beginnings, and the progression of contemporary South African design.
